title: English Dub
wikitext:
[]: English Dub? Post by PanzerEVA » Sun Jun 16, 2013 7:51 am I'm not asking if there is one, I know there is. I watch quite a lot of animes on AnimeSeason.com, but I really want to watch Evangelion in English. AnimeSeason only does Japanese. Is there a site that does it in English?

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Jun 16, 2013 8:13 am Answer: the internets. wrote: A. Copyrighted Media Do not ask for, or provide links to, sites illegally hosting copyrighted media. If you want to download the entire show, its soundtracks, and scans of the entire manga, fine -- but do it without involving the forum.
